message:
test(lean): update invariant theorem test link map with revised coverage mappings

Updates the Lean invariant theorem to Rust test link map with revised
coverage mappings that reflect recent theorem naming changes and
expanded proof coverage. Adjusts link entries to match the current
state of the Lean proof files and corresponding Rust conformance tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
